name: The Larkin Law Firm-San Diego
description_short: San Diego-based bankruptcy law firm specializing in Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings, debt relief, and consumer debt options with 17+ years of experience.
description_long:
The Larkin Law Firm is a bankruptcy law practice based in Carlsbad, California, founded and operated by Jeffrey D. Larkin, an attorney with over 17 years of experience in bankruptcy law and consumer debt relief. From 2002 to 2009, Larkin worked at two of the largest bankruptcy law firms in San Diego County and was ranked among the top five bankruptcy filers in the United States Bankruptcy Court for the Southern District of California in 2008. He transitioned to solo practice in 2009 to provide personalized, small-firm service rather than high-volume bankruptcy processing.

The firm offers comprehensive bankruptcy filing services for personal and small-business cases, specializing in Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy filings. Beyond bankruptcy, they provide consulting on alternative debt-relief options including credit repair, debt consolidation, debt settlement, loan modification, and short sales. The firm positions itself as a one-stop resource for understanding which debt-relief strategy is appropriate for each client's specific financial situation.

What distinguishes the Larkin Law Firm is their stated commitment to exploring every available option before recommending bankruptcy. Rather than pushing clients toward filing regardless of circumstances, they explicitly note that "bankruptcy may not be the right choice for everyone." The firm offers free, confidential consultations available via phone, in-person, Skype, or FaceTime with response within 24 hours. Operating hours extend from 9am to 9pm Monday through Sunday, and they serve a wide geographic area including North County San Diego, Inland Empire, East County, and South Bay communities.

The firm appears legitimate and established, with a professional website, specific contact information, and a principal attorney with documented credentials and track record. However, consumers should be aware that this is a solo practice operated by one attorney, which may limit availability or capacity during high-demand periods. Like all bankruptcy attorneys, they charge fees for representation, though the initial consultation is free.
pros: Attorney Jeffrey D. Larkin ranked among top 5 bankruptcy filers in US Bankruptcy Court, Southern District of California (2008)
17+ years of bankruptcy law and consumer debt relief experience
Free, confidential, fast consultation with response within 24 hours
Explicitly evaluates alternatives to bankruptcy before recommending filing
Extended availability: open 9am–9pm Monday through Sunday
Multiple consultation options: phone, in-person, Skype, or FaceTime
Serves broad geographic area across San Diego County and Inland Empire
cons: Solo practice with one attorney may limit capacity or availability for high volume of clients
Website lacks specific pricing information or fee structures for services
No independent third-party reviews, testimonials, or ratings visible on the website itself
Limited information about small-business bankruptcy expertise despite advertising that service
best_for: Individuals with significant consumer debt considering Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 bankruptcy
Small business owners exploring bankruptcy protection or debt restructuring
Consumers in San Diego County/Inland Empire area seeking personalized debt-relief consultation
People uncertain whether bankruptcy is appropriate and wanting comprehensive options review
diagnosis: The Larkin Law Firm is best for individuals and small-business owners in Southern California seeking qualified bankruptcy representation from an experienced solo practitioner who will evaluate non-bankruptcy alternatives before recommending filing. The main caveat is that as a solo practice, availability may be constrained, and consumers should confirm the attorney can accommodate their timeline and communication preferences before engaging.
